canonical_question: How do I set up startup banking — business bank accounts, accounting software (QBO vs Xero vs Wave), bookkeeping?
aliases: Best business bank account for startups Mercury vs Brex vs Chase
Startup accounting software comparison QuickBooks vs Xero vs Wave
How to set up bookkeeping for a new startup DIY vs Pilot vs Bench
Startup financial infrastructure checklist banking accounting payroll

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Capital One announced acquisition of Brex (Jan 2026, ~$5.15B)

constraints: Must have EIN before opening business bank account
Business must be legally formed (LLC, C-Corp, S-Corp)
Never commingle personal and business funds
Accrual-basis accounting required for VC-backed startups

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a financial planning strategy, not execution setup
User is evaluating startup readiness, not setting up financial infrastructure

depends_on.label: Founder readiness confirms financial runway before setup

related_to.label: Entity formation must happen before bank account opening

inputs_needed.question: What is the business entity type?
What is the startup's funding stage?
How many people need to be paid (founders + employees)?
What is the monthly budget for financial tools?
